title: Justicia migeodii
intro: Justicia migeodii, also known as Katundan, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, commonly found in the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The bioactive constituents of Justicia migeodii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems.
taxonomy: Justicia migeodii is a species of plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a flowering plant native to Madagascar.
